policy.discovery: 任务开始时只读取技能名称、说明、触发条件；需要时再打开 SKILL.md。
policy.install: 安装前必须检查来源、脚本、权限、依赖和 lockfile 变化；禁止 curl | bash。
policy.execution: 按任务阶段组合最小技能集，避免把无关技能塞进主上下文。
policy.evidence: M/L/CRITICAL 任务在 summary.md 记录 skills_used、失败原因和替代方案。

entries.name: OpenWolf
entries.trigger: 项目上下文超长或需要持久化会话记忆时
entries.recommendedAction: review command, lock version, and prefer isolated install

entries.name: RTK
entries.trigger: Shell 输出过长或日志噪声太大时
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Graphify
entries.trigger: 仓库结构复杂、需要跨模块关系图时
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Systematic Debugging
entries.trigger: 修复 bug 连续两次失败或根因不清时
entries.installCommand: 参照官方 README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Trace
entries.trigger: 需要追踪执行路径或补齐上下文链路时
entries.installCommand: 参照 OMC README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Deep Interview
entries.trigger: 需求模糊、成功标准不清时
entries.installCommand: 参照 OMC README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Writing Plans
entries.installCommand: 参照官方 README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: TDD
entries.trigger: 写任何新代码或修复回归问题时
entries.installCommand: 参照官方 README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Verification
entries.installCommand: 参照官方 README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Review
entries.trigger: 需要代码审查、回归评估或风险盘点时
entries.installCommand: 参照 gstack README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: Playwright MCP
entries.trigger: 需要浏览器验收、截图或 UI 流程验证时
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: GitHub MCP
entries.trigger: 需要读写 PR、Issue、Repo 元数据时
entries.installCommand: 参照官方 README 安装
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: GitHub CLI
entries.trigger: 需要拉取 PR、检查 CI 或管理 release 时
entries.recommendedAction: review source before install or execution

entries.name: ripgrep
entries.trigger: 需要快速搜索代码或文件时
entries.recommendedAction: install and use as the default search tool
